mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_TENANT (S_ID, S_NAME, I_STATUS, DT_OPEN_TIME, D_EXPIRE_DATE, I_AI_ENABLED, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sName}, #{iStatus}, #{dtOpenTime}, #{dExpireDate}, #{iAiEnabled}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_NAME, I_STATUS, DT_OPEN_TIME, D_EXPIRE_DATE, I_AI_ENABLED, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_TENANT WHERE S_ID = #{sId}

SELECT S_ID, S_NAME, I_STATUS, DT_OPEN_TIME, D_EXPIRE_DATE, I_AI_ENABLED, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_TENANT
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
